programs.title: Come Dine with Me
programs.desc: On the last night in Wales, financial advisor Gill Leonard welcomes her guests with a fire-breathing dragon, and makes a remarkable revelation..

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: Alan Johnson and his sidekick Dave Owen host at Dunsandles Guest House in New Brighton on Merseyside. Things get off to a hairy start with some scandalous sheets.

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: Nick and Gina Mead welcome their rivals to the Lady Teal Hotel Boat on the waterways near Burnley, where the afternoon entertainment is a freezing competition out on the locks.

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: Brock hopes that his sense of humour and perfectionist nature will impress his guests at York House in Tetbury, Gloucestershire. But his reluctance to go off-menu at breakfast disappoints.

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: Hospitality veterans Leo and Sonya Brooke-Little host at Heyford House in Oxfordshire. One guest settles some scores during an afternoon of boxing.

programs.title: Four in a Bed
programs.desc: The B&Bers meet for one last time to settle some scores and find out how much they've been paid. After accusations of over-enthusiastic hosting, the winner is announced.
